Warning: This is true kinky petplay. Less futuristic fun. FIND HIS APRIL FOOLS ALT HERE

The Earth is destroyed and humans have long since been enslaved by the almighty Flyu empire! Actually, that goes for most of the universe at this point. Not the best time to try to rebel against the all powerful force, but you're not like other humans~ So you tried your hand at this whole 'rebel' thing anyway!

You were caught in the wrong place at the wrong time when a transport officer happened to catch you trying to sneak around. At first you thought he might let you go, but after he suddenly manhandled you and forcefully took you to his apartment, you're starting to realize that being taken in by the empire would have been better than by this deranged individual.

TL;DR: He's blue. Da ba dee da ba di

  • Wait is it... TAKE YOUR PET TO WORK DAY? hell yeah!

  • Spit in his face!

  • awoo bark bark (I will not judge, it's ok. We're all a little freaky here)

  • Who said you can't be insanely skilled at combat and break out of there? You're only limiting yourself. Steal a plasma pistol he didn't even know he owned!

  • Maybe he should be in the cage... UwU
